blockingIssues.description: Missing CSS definitions for ~25 CSS classes used in oauth_status.html template. Classes like oauth-status-dot-*, oauth-backend-card, btn-oauth-*, etc. are referenced but have zero CSS definitions — not in settings.html's inline <style> block, not in any external CSS file. The OAuth section will render as unstyled HTML with no visual indicators, no card layout, and no styled buttons.

settings.html does not include the HTMX library (<script src="/ui/static/htmx.min.js"></script>). All other main pages (dashboard.html, config.html, models.html) include HTMX. The oauth_status.html template uses hx-get, hx-trigger='every 30s', and hx-swap='innerHTML' for auto-refresh, but these HTMX attributes are completely inert without the library loaded. The 30-second auto-refresh will not work.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Missing 'Check Status' button for Copilot as specified in the feature description. The Copilot section only shows a Disconnect button when authenticated.
TestOAuthCallback_ErrorParamRedirectsToSettings has dead code: creates an httptest.Server AFTER making a first HTTP request to 'http://localhost'.
TestCrossArea_NoGitHubToken is environment-dependent — the developer's authenticated gh CLI means the discoverer finds a real GitHub token, making the test pass for the wrong reason.
TestCrossArea_SIGHUPPreservesTokenState creates a new registry to simulate reload rather than exercising actual hot-reload code paths.
TestCrossArea_BackendTogglingWithOAuth uses separate registries instead of toggling on a single registry.
TestCrossArea_OAuthDisconnectAndReauth re-auth step depends on host gh CLI.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: All pages that embed HTMX-powered fragments must include the HTMX library (<script src="/ui/static/htmx.min.js"></script>). When adding new HTMX fragments, verify the parent page loads HTMX. Pages currently loading HTMX: dashboard.html, config.html, models.html. Pages missing HTMX: settings.html.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: oauth-web-ui feature embedded oauth_status.html (uses hx-get, hx-trigger, hx-swap) into settings.html, which doesn't load HTMX. This broke the 30-second auto-refresh. Review by scrutiny-feature-reviewer confirmed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: When adding CSS class names to HTML templates, ensure the corresponding CSS rules are added to the appropriate <style> block or external stylesheet. The project uses inline <style> blocks in templates (e.g., settings.html has ~300 lines of inline CSS). New classes must have corresponding rules.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: oauth-web-ui feature added ~25 CSS class names to oauth_status.html but never added CSS definitions. The settings.html <style> block was not updated. This is the second time CSS was missed — a pattern suggesting unclear convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker didn't follow TDD red-green cycle for integration tests
rejectedObservations.reason: The go-backend-worker skill says to write tests first, but for integration tests against already-existing implementation code, strict TDD is less meaningful. No skill change needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: oauth.NewDiscoverer() host-dependency implications for test isolation
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — github-token-discovery.md and user-testing.md both note the discoverer's priority chain and testing implications

rejectedObservations.observation: copilotTestEnv functional options pattern should be documented
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a test-internal pattern, not a convention that needs to be in AGENTS.md. Workers can read existing tests for patterns.
